company_core.name: Distyl AI
company_core.description: Distyl AI offers a platform that automates the creation and deployment of AI-driven workflows, leveraging generative AI models alongside existing organizational data. The technology focuses on transparency and auditability, allowing for the customization of workflows to meet specific business requirements.

founders.name: Arjun Prakash
founders.background:
Arjun Prakash has extensive experience in the tech industry, having served as Head of Solutions at Snorkel AI, where he led new product development and business strategy. Prior to that, he was an early executive at Palantir Technologies, contributing to the scaling of the commercial business over eight years. He also worked as an Associate at Blackrock Healthcare Group, developing quantitative models, and conducted research at Siemens, focusing on pattern recognition for medical imaging. Arjun holds a BS in Electrical and Computer Engineering from Cornell University and has furthered his education at Cornell Tech.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/arjunsprakash, twitter.com/arjunsprakash

founders.name: Derek Ho
founders.background:
Derek Ho has a strong background in business development and finance, having worked at Palantir Technologies from 2017 to 2022, where he managed C-suite relationships and drove digital transformation initiatives. Prior to that, he was a Fixed Income Trader at Citadel (2013-2016) and Credit Suisse (2010-2013), where he developed quantitative models to enhance profitability. He holds a BSc in Finance, Accounting, and Statistics from The Wharton School.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/derek-ho-distyl

agent_output.markdown:
# Distyl AI | Meeting Brief
*2026-03-03*

## TL;DR
Distyl AI is a B2B platform that automates the creation and deployment of AI-driven workflows using generative AI models integrated with existing organizational data, with a focus on transparency and auditability. The company recently closed a $175M Series B in September 2025, bringing total funding to $202M [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692). Headcount is up 12.7% over the past 90 days, signaling aggressive scaling post-raise [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692).

---

## Why This Meeting Matters
• **Massive, recent capital deployment:** A $175M Series B closed September 23, 2025 — one of the larger enterprise AI rounds in recent memory — backed by Lightspeed, Coatue, and Dell Technologies, among others, suggesting strong institutional conviction [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692)
• **Rapid team expansion:** 12.7% headcount growth in 90 days on a base of 124 employees indicates active hiring and operational scaling, likely tied to the fresh capital [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692)
• **Accelerating market traction:** Web traffic up 4.8% in 30 days points to growing top-of-funnel interest and potential pipeline momentum [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692)
• **High-value vertical focus:** The company targets Life Sciences, Healthcare, and Enterprise IT — sectors with strong willingness to pay for auditable, compliant AI workflows [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692)

---

## Company Snapshot
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Founded | 2022 |
| HQ | Not found in table |
| Employees | 124 (+12.7% 90d) |
| Products | Platform for automating creation and deployment of AI-driven workflows using generative AI and organizational data, with transparency and auditability features |
| Customers | B2B enterprise (Life Sciences, Healthcare, IT) |
| Total Funding | $202,000,000 |
| Last Round | $175,000,000 — September 23, 2025 |
*Last updated: Based on data retrieved with 90-day headcount and 30-day traffic trends [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692)[[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692)*

---

## Founders

**Arjun Prakash** — Co-Founder, CEO | linkedin.com/in/arjunsprakash
Arjun brings a rare combination of deep technical and commercial enterprise experience, having spent eight years as an early executive at Palantir Technologies scaling its commercial business [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692). He subsequently served as Head of Solutions at Snorkel AI, leading new product development and business strategy, and earlier conducted medical imaging pattern recognition research at Siemens and quantitative modeling at Blackrock Healthcare Group [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692). He holds a BS in Electrical and Computer Engineering from Cornell University with additional study at Cornell Tech [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692).

**Derek Ho** — Co-Founder, COO | linkedin.com/in/derek-ho-distyl
Derek brings a strong finance and enterprise business development background, having worked alongside Arjun at Palantir Technologies from 2017 to 2022, where he managed C-suite relationships and led digital transformation initiatives [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692). Prior to Palantir, he was a Fixed Income Trader at Citadel (2013–2016) and Credit Suisse (2010–2013), building quantitative models to drive profitability [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692). He holds a BSc in Finance, Accounting, and Statistics from The Wharton School [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692).

---

## Key Signals
• **[Hiring]** Headcount up 12.7% in 90 days (to 124 employees) — aggressive post-Series B team build-out — Source: Distyl AI Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692), recent
• **[Web Traffic]** Traffic up 4.8% in 30 days (14,870 visits) — consistent upward traction — Source: Distyl AI Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692), recent
• **[Funding]** Series B closed September 23, 2025; investors include AI Grant, Coatue Management, Millennium Technology Value Partners, Dell Technologies, and Lightspeed Venture Partners — Source: Distyl AI Company Profile [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692)

---

## In the News
No recent news available.

---

## Meeting Prep
**Key questions to ask:**
• The $175M Series B is a substantial raise for a company at this stage — what is the primary use of proceeds, and what milestones (ARR, customer count, product expansion) does the team expect to hit before a Series C? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692)
• Both founders have deep Palantir DNA, which is known for complex, high-touch enterprise deployments — how does Distyl AI's go-to-market and deployment model differ, and what does the typical sales cycle and contract size look like? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692)
• Transparency and auditability are core product differentiators — how are these features resonating specifically in regulated verticals like healthcare and life sciences, and can you share any customer validation or retention data? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692)[[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692)
• Headcount is growing at 12.7% in 90 days — which functions are being hired into most aggressively (engineering, sales, customer success), and what does the org structure look like at 124 people? [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/11533692)

**Recommended next step:** Request a product demo focused on a healthcare or life sciences use case, and ask for a customer reference from a recently deployed enterprise account to validate workflow auditability claims before advancing to diligence.
